sidebar.name: Manav Garg
sidebar.bio:
Motivated by curiosity and driven by data —
I combine code, creativity, and critical
thinking to build intelligent systems and
explore the frontier of AI.

quote.text:
Errors using inadequate data are much less
than those using no data at all
quote.author: Charles Babbage

sidebar.currentlyReading: The Laws of Human Nature - Robert Greene

paragraphs: I'm 22, and I can't help being obsessive about things — ML papers at 2am, why a UI feels slightly off, how a system breaks under load. I go deep. I'm a Software Developer, Machine Learning Engineer, and designer, not because I had to pick everything, but because I genuinely couldn't stop at one.

Outside of that, well- 
fast cars, mountain roads, live motorsport, ethereal places, great food. 
Life's too short to sit still.
achievements: Reduced infrastructure and pipeline operating costs by 20–25% at Vault22 through workload restructuring and automation.
Reduced LLM hallucinations by over 70% through systematic prompt engineering at IHX.
Cut data processing time from 24–36 hours to under 5 hours at IHX while improving dataset quality.
Restructured data lakes and resolved ETL pipeline failures, improving data integrity and cross-team accessibility
Built a full Web HMIS portal enabling instant patient record retrieval for medical practitioners (Sold it to local clinics as well)
professionalInterests: I want ML that actually ships — intelligent systems doing real work at real scale, not notebooks that never see production.
I'm deep in NLP, computer vision, and reinforcement learning, and obsessive about getting the maths and statistics right underneath it all.
I'm not trying to be a specialist. I want to understand everything. The polymath thing isn't an aesthetic — it's just how I think.
about.beyondTechnology: Self-taught designer. Visual thinker. I find the same thrill in cracking a hard problem as I do watching a perfect overtake at the last corner. I believe the best engineers are the ones who don't only do engineering.

bullets: Worked on tariff digitization initiatives.
Led comprehensive data mining, preparation, and cleansing processes.
Developed and trained custom model architectures, including but not limited to YOLO, Donut, and Custom Encoder-Decoder Models, as well as using RAG + LLM based pipelines.
Reduced data processing time from 24-36 hours to 4-5 hours using preprocessing and postprocessing techniques and finely constructed datasets.
Implemented robust backend APIs and deployment engines enabling scalable production deployment of machine learning solutions.
Introduced asynchronous processing to help APIs scale in production environments and handle large traffic volumes, drastically reducing downtime risk.
Led cost-optimization initiatives that reduced overall infrastructure and pipeline operating costs by 20–25% through workload restructuring and resource-efficient automation.
Optimized and deployed AWS services for scalable self-hosted model deployments and improved compute efficiency.
Performed extensive data cleaning, resolved ETL workflow issues, and restructured data lakes to ensure reliability, consistency, and accessibility.
Built analytics workflows and metric dashboards using Amazon QuickSight, enabling data-driven decision-making for business teams and investors.
